## Summary

-

## Data Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated official source URLs.
- [ ] I preserved historical date snapshots instead of overwriting old pricing.
- [ ] I recorded context tiers, cache pricing, currency, discounts, or special conditions separately when they affect billing.
- [ ] I ran `node scripts/validate-data.mjs`.
- [ ] I ran `node --check src/app.js` if JavaScript changed.
